name: human-machine
description: Paul R. Daugherty and H. James Wilson's Human + Machine — an executable toolkit that maps any AI-transformation challenge onto the Missing Middle framework (MELDS: Mindset → Experimentation → Leadership → Data → Skills), revealing where humans and machines collaborate, not compete.
useCase: AI strategy design, human-machine collaboration planning, fusion skills development, responsible AI audit, and MELDS-based organizational transformation
knownRisks: May oversimplify complex organizational transformation — MELDS is a framework, not a step-by-step recipe
The Missing Middle framework assumes organizational willingness to redesign processes, which may face resistance
Case studies are primarily large enterprises — small organizations may need to adapt the model
